scripts.test:all: pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm graph:validate && .venv/bin/ruff format --check runtime/python && .venv/bin/ruff check runtime/python && .venv/bin/mypy runtime/python/policyc_runtime && .venv/bin/pytest -q runtime/python/tests
scripts.demo: pnpm build && node dist/cli.js compile-candidates --input "what's the latest OpenAI news?" --output demo-run --model fake-v1 && .venv/bin/policyc-runtime run demo-run/manifest.json
